ocr_findings.description: Section header rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR; image shows '試験にはコレが出る！'. The bold red text 'コレ' was misread as 'つし' — a visually similar kana substitution error affecting the heading meaning.

Caption '● サービスデスクのイメージ' appears after the image placeholder in OCR (line 15) but is correctly present. The section header for the diagram '● サービスサポートの関連図' is captured at line 22 but lacks the diagram content (expected since diagram is image). Minor.

reviewer_notes: Page 08-03 covers service desk and escalation. Main explanatory paragraphs for サービスデスク and エスカレーション are faithfully captured. The key error is コレ→つし in the exam-tip box header, which changes meaning. All substantive body text including p.279 reference is present.
